pageTitle: Legal advice before you submit the response
caption: Respond to a property possession claim
heading: Check whether your client has had legal advice before you submit the response
secondaryHeading: Respond to a property possession claim
question: Has your client had any free legal advice?
hadLegalAdviceHint: We’re asking this question so we can check defendants are getting the free support they’re entitled to. Your answer will not affect the outcome of the claim
paragraph1: Housing experts are ready and waiting to help defendants, and it takes just minutes to find one in your client’s area.
listItem1: Visit the find a legal adviser service (opens in new tab).
listItem2: Enter your client’s postcode and select the 'Housing Loss Prevention Advice Service' and ‘Housing’ options.
listItem4: Contact them to discuss your client’s options.
paragraph2: Civil Legal Advice (CLA) can also put your client in touch with a local expert. You can either:
bullet1: call 0345 345 4345. Lines are open Monday to Friday, from 9am to 8pm and Saturday from 9am to 12.30pm
bullet2: text ‘legalaid’ and your client’s name to 80010 to ask CLA to call back. This costs the same as a normal text message
subHeading2: Help that might be available at the hearing
paragraph3: If your client does not have their own legal adviser, they might be able to speak to a duty adviser (a legal professional who helps people at court) on the day of the hearing. If available, they can give advice and represent your client at the hearing for free.
paragraph4: If your client wants to speak to the duty adviser, they should arrive at least 45 minutes before the hearing.

errors.hadLegalAdvice: Select if your client has had any free legal advice
